final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: concept-art
Asset type: character concept art for game production
Primary request: female warrior from desert civilization standing on high platform of ruins
Scene/backdrop: desert ruins with massive crumbling stone columns, half-buried ancient temple, approaching sandstorm in distance, sky in eerie orange-yellow hue
Subject: female warrior with three-dimensional facial contours, resolute eyes, tribal tattoo on forehead, wearing brass scale armor mixed with golden silk, armor edges carved with ancient cuneiform runes gleaming in sunlight, crescent-shaped scimitar hanging at waist with turquoise and carnelian-embedded scabbard
Style/medium: game concept art style referencing Assassin's Creed Origins art direction, highly detailed, painterly digital illustration
Composition/framing: medium shot with character centered on elevated platform, ruins framing background, atmospheric depth
Lighting/mood: dramatic theatrical lighting, golden hour sunlight hitting brass armor creating strong highlights, ominous orange-yellow sky from approaching sandstorm, high contrast shadows
Color palette: warm brass gold + burnt orange sky + sandy beige + turquoise accents + deep carnelian red
Materials/textures: polished brass scales with engraved cuneiform, flowing golden silk fabric, weathered stone ruins, fine sand particles in air, semi-precious stone inlays
Constraints: preserve Assassin's Creed Origins aesthetic reference, maintain desert civilization cultural identity, keep cuneiform rune details on armor edges
Avoid: modern elements, clean pristine surfaces, anime stylization, oversaturated neon colors, low-detail background
